title: astelia tovii
intro: Astelia tovii, also known as the Tī Kōuka, is a rare and endemic New Zealand plant species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, such as flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Astelia tovii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially aiding in the management of diabetes. Herbal preparations of Astelia tovii, such as teas and tinctures, can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in water or a solvent, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
